news.t: 3 Index Bear Funds Nearing Key Chart Support

holdings.infoBox: SDOW is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings. The top holdings are ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF stock at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, and TREASURY BILL at N/A.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro Short Dow30 (SDOW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones Industrial Average index. The fund provides 3x inverse exposure to the price-weighted Dow Jones Industrial Average, which includes 30 of the largest US companies. SDOW was launched on Feb 9, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: 3 Index Bear Funds Nearing Key Chart Support
data.text: Stocks have bounced back this week after falling as much as 35% in March. Capitalize on further downswings using these inverse index ETFs.
